baseline.anonymized_text: [PER_ZES], also known as [PER_JIH], is a [LOC_BWS] wushu practitioner. baseline.anonymized_text: [PER_FMV] (18 [DATE_TAK] – 14 [DATE_RGR]) inventor of the ‘[ORG_RCN]’ life-saving apparatus, was born at [LOC_EWZ], [LOC_VEF], [LOC_EGZ], [LOC_OSX], on 18 [DATE_TAK]. [PER_YQG] spent much labour in attempting to devise a lifeboat, but produced no satisfactory results, and turned his attention to the ‘Rocket’ life-saving apparatus, an early form of the Breeches buoy. In addition to this, [PER_YNS] was dismayed at the then common practice of burying victims of shipwrecks in common graves in unconsecrated ground near the site of the wreck, having seen the dead from the [ORG_BAQ] buried in the dunes at [LOC_DMN]. baseline.anonymized_text: [PER_YTS], ([DATE_PSJ] – [DATE_RWC]) was a [LOC_QYH] painter who primarily worked and lived in [LOC_GJT]. [PER_HMY] was born in [LOC_WVL] into a [ORG_LPJ].
